title: pilosella filifera
intro: Pilosella filifera, also known as Pilosella officinarum, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family, native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues, including wounds, digestive problems, and skin conditions. The medicinal properties of Pilosella filifera are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to have antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of Pilosella filifera are typically made from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
